commands.review_summary:
The PR changes the doctor `groupAllowFrom` fallback migration to skip writes when bundled channel schema metadata is missing and adds an external `email` regression test.

PR surface: Source +6, Tests +17. Total +23 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for source-level reproduction: current main permits missing-schema writes and then assigns `groupAllowFrom` into account records. I did not run a live ClawMail upgrade in this read-only review, but the linked issue and PR body provide concrete before/after evidence.
commands.review_followup: - No automated repair job is needed; maintainer review should accept or reject the schema-missing fail-closed behavior and wait for normal merge gates.
